blended.narrative: Buttermilk is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 35".
